overall.description: A slow first-person exploration of a dimly lit luxury apartment interior featuring a large panoramic aquarium wall. The footage exhibits high-end game engine graphics with ray-traced lighting and reflective surfaces, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment living space with panoramic aquarium feature wall

agents.ego_description: slowly advancing through the dimly lit luxury interior, observing the illuminated aquarium and modern furnishings

entered.detail: large floor-to-ceiling aquarium wall with aquatic life and blue-green lighting visible in the background
dark polished counter surface with reflective finish and minimal objects on top
horizontal wooden slat ceiling with integrated recessed lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, luxurious interior space dominated by a glowing panoramic aquarium visible across the room. The camera moves slowly forward past a sleek modern counter, revealing polished wooden floors and a slatted wood ceiling with subtle accent lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment living space with panoramic aquarium feature wall

events.description: horizontal strip lighting along the left wall becomes visible as the camera pans left

agents.ego_description: continuing to move through the space while panning left to reveal the side wall lighting features

entered.detail: continuous horizontal LED strip lighting running along the base of the left wall

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues moving and pans left, the aquarium shifts to the right side of the frame while continuous strip lighting along the left wall comes into view, illuminating the polished floor and enhancing the moody, high-end atmosphere of the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, luxurious interior that shifts from a focus on a glowing aquatic display to the sleek architectural lines of the room. It begins by gliding forward past a modern counter, where the light from a panoramic aquarium illuminates polished wooden floors and a slatted ceiling with subtle accent lighting. As the camera continues its advance, it pans left, causing the aquarium to drift toward the right side of the frame. The scene then opens up to reveal continuous strip lighting along the left wall, which casts sharp reflections across the floor and enhances the moody, high-end atmosphere of the space.
